requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radio Frequency Performance (EN/ETSI via DSMK)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——无线电频率性能（EN/ETSI，通过DSMK）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——無線電頻率性能（EN/ETSI，通過DSMK）

summary.en: Albania's General Directorate of Standardization (DSMK — Drejtoria e Përgjithshme e Standardizimit) progressively adopts EN/ETSI harmonised standards for radio frequency performance testing, mirroring EU practice as part of Albania's EU accession alignment. AKEP accepts test reports based on EN/ETSI standards as the technical evidence for type approval applications. Key standards include EN 300 328 (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi / Bluetooth) and EN 301 893 (5 GHz Wi-Fi). AKEP manages spectrum and frequency assignments with progressive alignment toward EU radio frequency decisions.
summary.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚标准化总局（DSMK）作为入盟对接的一部分，逐步采用EN/ETSI协调标准进行无线电频率性能测试，与欧盟实践保持一致。AKEP接受基于EN/ETSI标准的检测报告作为型式核准申请的技术证明。主要标准包括EN 300 328（2.4GHz Wi-Fi/蓝牙）和EN 301 893（5GHz Wi-Fi）。AKEP在频谱和频率分配管理方面逐步向欧盟无线电频率决策靠拢。
summary.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞標準化總局（DSMK）作為入盟對接的一部分，逐步採用EN/ETSI協調標準進行無線電頻率性能測試，與歐盟實踐保持一致。AKEP接受基於EN/ETSI標準的測試報告作為型式核准申請的技術證明。主要標準包括EN 300 328（2.4GHz Wi-Fi/藍牙）和EN 301 893（5GHz Wi-Fi）。AKEP在頻譜和頻率分配管理方面逐步向歐盟無線電頻率決策靠攏。

standards_or_laws: EN 300 328 V2.2.2 — Wideband transmission systems; 2.4 GHz ISM band (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)
EN 300 440 V2.2.1 — Short range devices (868 MHz, 433 MHz IoT)
DSMK (Drejtoria e Përgjithshme e Standardizimit) — Albanian standards body adopting EN/ETSI

summary.en: China's SRRC radio type approval process applies MIIT-mandated technical requirements based on GB/T and YD/T standards for frequency performance. These are not harmonised with ETSI/EN standards. SRRC approval covers frequency, modulation, and transmitter power requirements specific to China's allocated spectrum.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型式核准流程基于工业和信息化部规定的技术要求，采用GB/T和YD/T标准进行频率性能测试，与ETSI/EN标准不协调。SRRC核准涵盖中国分配频谱特有的频率、调制及发射功率要求。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型式核准流程基於工業和信息化部規定的技術要求，採用GB/T和YD/T標準進行頻率性能測試，與ETSI/EN標準不協調。SRRC核准涵蓋中國分配頻譜特有的頻率、調製及發射功率要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电发射设备型号核准
MIIT spectrum management regulations (frequency allocation table)

gap.en: SRRC approval and GB/YD standards are not recognised by AKEP. New RF performance testing to EN/ETSI standards is required for AKEP type approval. However, if the product already holds CE marking with EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports, those reports are generally accepted by AKEP, significantly reducing re-testing costs. Products without prior CE testing must commission fresh EN/ETSI tests from an accredited laboratory.
gap.zh: SRRC核准及GB/YD标准不被AKEP认可。AKEP型式核准要求按EN/ETSI标准进行新的射频性能测试。但若产品已持有CE标志并附有EN 300 328/EN 301 893检测报告，AKEP通常接受这些报告，可显著降低重新测试成本。无CE测试经历的产品须委托经认可实验室进行全新EN/ETSI测试。
gap.zht: SRRC核准及GB/YD標準不被AKEP認可。AKEP型式核准要求按EN/ETSI標準進行新的射頻性能測試。但若產品已持有CE標誌並附有EN 300 328/EN 301 893測試報告，AKEP通常接受這些報告，可顯著降低重新測試成本。無CE測試經歷的產品須委託經認可實驗室進行全新EN/ETSI測試。

source.publisher: DSMK — Drejtoria e Përgjithshme e Standardizimit (General Directorate of Standardization, Albania)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RF performance testing to EN/ETSI standards is mandatory as the technical basis for AKEP type approval in Albania. SRRC approval is not recognised. Existing EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports from CE certification are generally reusable for AKEP, but confirm with AKEP or a local representative whether the specific test report format and accreditation scope are accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按EN/ETSI标准进行的射频性能测试是阿尔巴尼亚AKEP型式核准技术依据的强制要求。SRRC核准不被认可。CE认证中的EN 300 328/EN 301 893检测报告通常可在AKEP申请中复用，但请向AKEP或本地代表确认特定检测报告格式和认可范围是否被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按EN/ETSI標準進行的射頻性能測試是阿爾巴尼亞AKEP型式核准技術依據的強制要求。SRRC核准不被認可。CE認證中的EN 300 328/EN 301 893測試報告通常可在AKEP申請中複用，但請向AKEP或本地代表確認特定測試報告格式和認可範圍是否被接受。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Conducted and Radiated Emissions (EN 301 489 via DSMK)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——传导与辐射骚扰（EN 301 489，通过DSMK）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——傳導與輻射騷擾（EN 301 489，通過DSMK）

summary.en: EMC requirements for conducted and radiated disturbance emissions from radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment in Albania are based on EN 301 489-1 (general EMC requirements for radio equipment) and product-specific EN 301 489-x companion standards, adopted progressively by DSMK in alignment with EU practice. Compliance must be demonstrated as part of the AKEP type approval application. Albania's EU accession candidate status drives ongoing adoption of the full EN 301 489 series.
summary.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚无线电设备和电信终端设备的传导与辐射骚扰电磁兼容要求，基于DSMK与欧盟实践接轨逐步采用的EN 301 489-1（无线电设备通用电磁兼容要求）及产品专用EN 301 489-x配套标准。须作为AKEP型式核准申请的一部分进行符合性验证。阿尔巴尼亚入盟候选国地位推动着EN 301 489系列的持续采用。
summary.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞無線電設備和電信終端設備的傳導與輻射騷擾電磁相容要求，基於DSMK與歐盟實踐接軌逐步採用的EN 301 489-1（無線電設備通用電磁相容要求）及產品專用EN 301 489-x配套標準。須作為AKEP型式核准申請的一部分進行符合性驗證。阿爾巴尼亞入盟候選國地位推動著EN 301 489系列的持續採用。

standards_or_laws: EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3 — EMC standard for radio equipment; Part 1: Common technical requirements
EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4 — EMC specific conditions for wideband data and HIPERLAN equipment (Wi-Fi / BT)
DSMK (Drejtoria e Përgjithshme e Standardizimit) — Albanian standards body progressively adopting EN series

summary.en: China applies GB/T 9254.1-2021 for radiated and conducted emissions from information technology and telecom equipment, and GB 17625.1-2022 for harmonic current emissions. These are mandatory national standards distinct from and not interchangeable with the EN 301 489 series.
summary.zh: 中国对信息技术和电信设备的辐射与传导骚扰适用GB/T 9254.1-2021，对谐波电流骚扰适用GB 17625.1-2022，均为强制性国家标准，与EN 301 489系列不同且不可互换。
summary.zht: 中國對信息技術和電信設備的輻射與傳導騷擾適用GB/T 9254.1-2021，對諧波電流騷擾適用GB 17625.1-2022，均為強制性國家標準，與EN 301 489系列不同且不可互換。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics
GB 17625.1-2022 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Harmonic current emissions (IEC 61000-3-2)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Limits and methods of measurement of immunity characteristics (IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: GB/T 9254 and GB 17625 test data are not accepted by AKEP in place of EN 301 489 series reports. If the product already has CE-compliant EN 301 489-1 / EN 301 489-17 test reports, AKEP generally accepts these. Without prior CE testing, new EN 301 489 tests must be commissioned from an accredited laboratory. The EN 301 489 series measures different disturbance limits and test methods compared with GB/T 9254, so results are not directly transferable.
gap.zh: GB/T 9254和GB 17625测试数据不被AKEP接受以替代EN 301 489系列报告。若产品已持有CE符合的EN 301 489-1/EN 301 489-17检测报告，AKEP通常接受。无CE测试经历的产品须委托经认可实验室进行新的EN 301 489测试。EN 301 489系列与GB/T 9254在骚扰限值和测试方法上存在差异，结果不可直接转用。
gap.zht: GB/T 9254和GB 17625測試數據不被AKEP接受以替代EN 301 489系列報告。若產品已持有CE符合的EN 301 489-1/EN 301 489-17測試報告，AKEP通常接受。無CE測試經歷的產品須委託經認可實驗室進行新的EN 301 489測試。EN 301 489系列與GB/T 9254在騷擾限值和測試方法上存在差異，結果不可直接轉用。

source.publisher: DSMK — Drejtoria e Përgjithshme e Standardizimit (General Directorate of Standardization, Albania)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EN 301 489-series EMC compliance is mandatory for AKEP type approval in Albania. GB/T 9254 or GB 17625 test reports are not accepted. Existing EN 301 489 CE test reports can typically be reused for AKEP applications, reducing costs; confirm format and scope acceptance with AKEP or a qualified local representative before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EN 301 489系列电磁兼容合规性是阿尔巴尼亚AKEP型式核准的强制要求。GB/T 9254或GB 17625检测报告不被接受。现有的EN 301 489 CE测试报告通常可在AKEP申请中复用以降低成本；提交前请向AKEP或合格本地代表确认格式和范围是否被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EN 301 489系列電磁相容合規性是阿爾巴尼亞AKEP型式核准的強制要求。GB/T 9254或GB 17625測試報告不被接受。現有的EN 301 489 CE測試報告通常可在AKEP申請中複用以降低成本；提交前請向AKEP或合格本地代表確認格式和範圍是否被接受。
